steps.title: Identify the participle structure
steps.content: ”Spoken by most current residents of Argentina” is a passive participle construction. The blank must provide the element that connects Spanish to it.

steps.title: Apply the comma and participle rule
steps.content:
“Being” forms “Spanish being spoken by most current residents of Argentina,” a participle phrase that adds information after the comma.

Choosing “is,” “is being,” or “will be” would each create an independent clause following just a comma—a comma splice violation.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
